response.step_by_step_log: Identified song title '許婚っきゅん' (Iinazukkyun) and credited artist 'ano' from on-screen text. Performed web search using query: '"許婚っきゅん" ano Japanese and English lyrics'. Found the song, extracted Japanese lyrics, and provided an English translation based on search results. Analyzed video to segment the musical performance from the post-performance talk and merchandise announcement.
response.global_summary: A live concert segment featuring VTuber Roboco performing a cover of '許婚っきゅん' (Iinazukkyun) by ano, followed by dialogue and a birthday merchandise announcement.

scenes.description: Intro dance and setup on stage.
Roboco starts performing the song '許婚っきゅん' with on-screen text in the bottom left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どいつもこいつもなんだかやっぱノーテンキ
気になるあの娘も悩みはきっとあるでしょ？
ざっくり半端な憂鬱ともあふれ同じ
頭の中はぐちゃぐちゃ
頭の中はぐちゃぐちゃ
い・い・許婚っきゅん
I Love You なのだ
四六時中 愛をちょうだい
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Everyone around seems so carefree,
But still, that girl I’m interested in has her own troubles, right?
A bunch of miscellaneous and depressed melancholy people
They're all just the same, aren't they?
My head is all jumbled up
My head is all jumbled up
I-I-Fiancé-Kyun
I love you, that's what it is
I want love all the time
